scripts.ingest:local: npm run -w @twbbd/shared build && npm run -w @twbbd/ingester build && DATABASE_URL=postgres://twbbd:twbbd@localhost:5432/twbbd TWSE_STOCKS=all TW_STOCK_UNIVERSE=twse DEBUG_INGEST=0 npm run -w @twbbd/ingester ingest:once
scripts.ingest:fake: npm run -w @twbbd/shared build && npm run -w @twbbd/ingester build && TWSE_STOCKS= npm run -w @twbbd/ingester ingest:once
scripts.build: npm run -w @twbbd/shared build && npm run -w @twbbd/api build && npm run -w @twbbd/ingester build && npm run -w @twbbd/web build
